base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of unused_sidehopper_waver_fake_ridley — a character (boss) from 1986 metroid. 'Unused' sprites in ROM — Sidehopper (Brinstar variant) + Waver (Kraid's Lair variant) + Fake Ridley (2-frame pink variant) not placed in retail levels. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'Unused' sprites in ROM — Sidehopper (Brinstar variant) + Waver (Kraid's Lair variant) + Fake Ridley (2-frame pink variant) not placed in retail levels
